methodology: Separated CONTENT parity from FEATURE parity. Counts from data/audit/unimported-legacy-content.json, pathway catalog sync, optional Prisma, and route scans — not claims without file evidence.
definitionOfDone: Trace: legacy source → current source → route → audit row (this matrix).
If UI not routable or DB not wired, status cannot be matched.
Run `npm run audit:full-parity` before this script to refresh parity-registry-lesson-snapshot.json (structural gate).
